cleanup_rules: Join non-empty text segments into one stream.
Apply GenFEC detokenization replacements for WikiText artifacts such as @-@, @,@, and @.@.
Tighten punctuation, parentheses, apostrophes, and selected symbols with regex replacements.
Remove remaining non-standard characters outside the GenFEC allow-list.
Split into 100 consecutive samples of 300 words each.
tokenization_rule: Tokenize separately for each model/tokenizer. Do not reuse GenFEC Qwen token counts or hash profiles.
